title: A Gentle Brew
description: A wholesome and peaceful Minecraft experience, brewed for comfort, creativity, and calm exploration.
body:
# ☕ A Gentle Brew – A Cozy Minecraft Escape
Take a deep breath, settle in, and pour yourself a warm cup of tea  because this is Minecraft, brewed differently.

A Gentle Brew is a cozy, feel good modpack built for players who want to slow down and savor the simple joys of the game. Designed for creative builders, gentle explorers, and lovers of peaceful gameplay, this modpack wraps you in a warm, welcoming world full of charm and serenity.

Whether you're crafting the perfect cottagecore home, harvesting herbs from your garden, decorating your cozy interior, or wandering through tranquil forests with your favorite shader, this pack is all about slowing the pace, soothing your senses, and inspiring creativity.

**🌿 Features**

Peaceful & Relaxed Gameplay: No harsh survival grind, no overwhelming mechanics — just good vibes.

Immersive Worldbuilding: Enhanced worldgen, dynamic seasons(Soon to be added), and ambient sounds that make every biome feel alive.

Cottagecore Aesthetic: Decorate with charming furniture, grow colorful gardens, and build your ideal homestead.

Farming & Cooking: Grow crops, prepare meals, and host picnics. The kitchen is the heart of your home.

Creative Building Tools: Dozens of blocks and decor options for detailed interiors and dream builds.

Multiplayer Friendly: Perfect for cozy community servers, couple playthroughs, or solo serenity.

Performance Friendly: Designed to run well even on mid-range systems with optimized mods and configurations.

## 🧵 For Builders, Dreamers, and Homebodies
A Gentle Brew isn’t about slaying the Ender Dragon or speedrunning through dimensions. It’s about waking up in your hand-built cottage, hearing ambient birdsong as the blocky sun rises, harvesting your blooming lavender and wheat, brewing a cup of tea, and watching the Minecraft rain fall outside your window. It’s about placing every stair, trapdoor, and flower pot with love. Decorating your base until it feels like home. Taking strolls through pixelated meadows, building cozy villages with friends, and filling your world with warmth and personality.

Whether you're unwinding solo on a rainy afternoon or building a peaceful village with close friends, Cup of Tea offers a warm, comforting Minecraft experience like a cozy blanket wrapped in blocks.

### Notes:
All the mods i used in this modpack are NOT mine and all the pictures in the gallery are NOT mine so please support the original creators <3
